reasoning: Crystal Palace is positioned 8th-10th in the Premier League as of early November 2025. While their underlying metrics are surprisingly strong—leading the league in expected goals (xG)—they are heavily squandering chances with the worst xG-to-goals conversion rate (-5.4). Betting markets had them at 500/1 at the start of the season and peaked at 66/1 (approx 1.5% implied probability) after a good September run, but poor finishing has kept them mid-table. Major predictive outlets like NBC Sports project them to finish 9th with roughly 57 points (well short of a title-winning 80+ points). The base rate of a mid-table, non-'Big 6' team rallying to win the Premier League is near zero. The true probability is likely <1%, so I am predicting 0.05 to comply with the 5% minimum threshold constraint specified in the prompt rules.
